2605.10791.title: PathISE: Learning Informative Path Supervision for Knowledge Graph Question Answering
2605.10791.paper_summary: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) aims to answer user questions by reasoning over Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Recent KGQA methods mainly follow the retrieval-augmented generation paradigm to ground Large Language Models~(LLMs) with structured knowledge from KGs. However, training effective models to retrieve question-relevant evidence from KGs typically requires high-quality intermediate supervision signals, such as question-relevant paths or subgraphs, which are time- and resource-intensive to obtain. We propose PathISE, a novel framework for learning high-quality intermediate supervision from answer-level labels. PathISE introduces a lightweight transformer-based estimator that estimates the informativeness of relation paths to construct pseudo path-level supervision. This supervision is then distilled into an LLM path generator, whose generated paths are grounded in the KG to provide compact evidence for inductive answer reasoning. ExtensiveISE experiments on three KGQA benchmarks show that PathISE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art KGQA performance, and provides reusable supervision signals that can enhance existing KGQA models, without relying on costly LLM-refined supervision signals. Our source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PathISE-2F87.
2605.10791.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜問答（KGQA）旨在通過對知識圖譜（KGs）的推理來回答用戶問題。最近的KGQA方法主要遵循檢索增強生成範式，利用來自KG的結構化知識來支持大型語言模型（LLMs）。然而，訓練有效的模型以從KG中檢索與問題相關的證據通常需要高質量的中介監督信號，例如與問題相關的路徑或子圖，這些信號的獲取通常需要耗費大量時間和資源。我們提出了PathISE，一種從答案級標籤學習高質量中介監督的新框架。PathISE引入了一種輕量級的基於Transformer的估計器，該估計器評估關係路徑的信息量，以構建偽路徑級監督。然後，這種監督被提煉到LLM路徑生成器中，其生成的路徑基於KG提供緊湊的證據以進行歸納回答推理。在三個KGQA基準上的廣泛ISE實驗表明，PathISE實現了具有競爭力或最先進的KGQA性能，並提供可重用的監督信號，這些信號可以增強現有的KGQA模型，而無需依賴昂貴的LLM精煉監督信號。我們的源代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PathISE-2F87 獲得。
2605.10791.author: Shengxiang Gao et.al.
2605.10791.authors: Shengxiang Gao, Chao Lei, Jey Han Lau, Jianzhong Qi
